input_summary: A B2B SaaS company is losing 35% of trial users before they reach their first 'aha moment' — defined as connecting their first data source within 7 days. The onboarding flow is too long and requires IT involvement that new users cannot obtain independently. The product team wants to redesign onboarding to be self-serve and reduce time-to-first-value from 14 days to 3 days.

people_and_roles.source_text: new users cannot obtain IT involvement independently
The product team wants to redesign onboarding
requires IT involvement that new users cannot obtain independently

systems_and_tools.source_text: connecting their first data source within 7 days

processes.source_text: The onboarding flow is too long and requires IT involvement

business_objectives.value: Reduce time-to-first-value from 14 days to 3 days
business_objectives.source_text: reduce time-to-first-value from 14 days to 3 days

business_objectives.value: Make onboarding fully self-serve — no IT involvement required

business_objectives.source_text: losing 35% of trial users before they reach their first aha moment

pain_points.value: 35% trial drop-off before first aha moment
pain_points.source_text: losing 35% of trial users before they reach their first aha moment

pain_points.value: Onboarding requires IT involvement non-technical users cannot get
pain_points.source_text: requires IT involvement that new users cannot obtain independently

pain_points.value: Time-to-first-value (14 days) exceeds what trial users will wait
pain_points.source_text: reduce time-to-first-value from 14 days to 3 days

constraints.value: Solution must not require IT access or OAuth admin credentials from the end user

dates_and_timelines.value: Target aha moment within 7 days of trial start
